src/engine/config/diplomacy_config

      • reloadDiplomacyConfig()

Diplomacy Configuration Loader

Loads diplomacy values from config/diplomacy.toml using toml_serialization Allows runtime configuration for balance testing

Global configuration instanceHelper to reload configuration (for testing)

Types

DetectionConfig = object
  failed_espionage_prestige_loss*: int
DiplomacyConfig = object
  pact_violations*: PactViolationsConfig
  espionage_effects*: EspionageEffectsConfig
  detection*: DetectionConfig
Complete diplomacy configuration loaded from TOML 
EspionageEffectsConfig = object
  tech_theft_srp_stolen*: int
  low_sabotage_dice*: string
  low_sabotage_iu_min*: int
  low_sabotage_iu_max*: int
  high_sabotage_dice*: string
  high_sabotage_iu_min*: int
  high_sabotage_iu_max*: int
  assassination_srp_reduction*: float
  assassination_duration_turns*: int
  economic_disruption_ncv_reduction*: float
  economic_disruption_duration_turns*: int
  propaganda_tax_reduction*: float
  propaganda_duration_turns*: int
  cyber_attack_effect*: string
PactViolationsConfig = object
  dishonored_status_turns*: int
  dishonor_corruption_magnitude*: float
  diplomatic_isolation_turns*: int
  pact_reinstatement_cooldown*: int
  repeat_violation_window*: int

Vars

globalDiplomacyConfig = loadDiplomacyConfig("config/diplomacy.toml")

Procs

proc loadDiplomacyConfig(configPath: string = "config/diplomacy.toml"): DiplomacyConfig {.
    ...raises: [IOError, SerializationError, TomlError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Load diplomacy configuration from TOML file Uses toml_serialization for type-safe parsing 
proc reloadDiplomacyConfig() {....raises: [IOError, SerializationError, TomlError],
                               tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect],
                               forbids: [].}
Reload configuration from file
